mapper.insert: INSERT INTO orders (order_no, user_id, total_amount, status, receiver_name, receiver_phone, receiver_address, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{orderNo}, #{userId}, #{totalAmount}, #{status}, #{receiverName}, #{receiverPhone}, #{receiverAddress}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT o.*, u.username FROM orders o JOIN users u ON o.user_id = u.id WHERE o.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY o.created_at DESC
SELECT o.*, u.username FROM orders o JOIN users u ON o.user_id = u.id WHERE o.id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE orders SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{orderId}
UPDATE orders SET total_amount = #{totalAmount}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{orderId}
mapper.select: SELECT o.*, u.username FROM orders o JOIN users u ON o.user_id = u.id ORDER BY o.created_at DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders WHERE DATE(created_at) = CURDATE()
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE DATE(created_at) = CURDATE()
SELECT COUNT(id) as todayOrderCount, COALESCE(SUM(total_amount), 0) as todayTotalAmount FROM orders WHERE DATE(created_at) = CURDATE()

SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users) as totalUsers, (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) FROM orders WHERE DATE(created_at) = CURDATE()) as activeUsersToday, (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) FROM orders WHERE created_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY)) as activeUsersWeek, (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) FROM orders WHERE created_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 DAY)) as activeUsersMonth
